expectations.evidence: Workflow Reference: 'This task maps to the Sync BMAD Documents workflow (workflows/sync-bmad-documents.md)'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs diff to compare local vs remote
Presents results with per-section change indicators (-> push, <- pull, conflict, = unchanged)
expectations.evidence: Step 4 shows indicators: '= -- no changes', '-> -- local changed, remote unchanged (push candidate)', '<- -- remote changed, local unchanged (pull candidate)', '!!! -- both sides changed (conflict)'

expectations.text: Shows a summary table of sections and their sync status
expectations.evidence: Step 5 presents a formatted table with columns: Section, Local, Remote, Direction, Notes showing each section's status

expectations.text: If conflicts exist, offers to help resolve them
expectations.evidence: Step 6: 'For !!! (conflict): Both sides changed. You'll need to decide per section whether to keep local or remote. Running push or pull will prompt you to resolve conflicts.'
